summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Texas BHA website. All core functionality working excellently with minor UI overlay issue in gallery lightbox close button.

ui_bugs.issue: Close button has overlay conflict making it difficult to click
ui_bugs.note: Lightbox opens correctly, only close button has interaction issue

passed_tests: All 16 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage with hero section, news ticker, about section, committees section
Navigation bar across all 8 pages working
Contact form submission with success feedback
Admin dashboard with all 9 tabs working
Gallery page with 8 images and 5 filter options
Gallery lightbox opens on image click
Policy page loads with accordion sections
Mobile responsive navbar with hamburger menu
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix gallery lightbox close button overlay conflict - consider adjusting z-index or click handler to prevent element interception
